title: Deduplicate validate_stmt / collect_regex_patterns walker
description: validate_stmt (lib.rs:174) and collect_regex_patterns (lib.rs:275) implement the same imperative index-loop + clause-boundary state machine (clause_start, has_*_tag, Block-triggers-flush) identically. The only difference is the action taken on each clause (validate vs cache). This is ~60 lines duplicated. A shared clause-walker abstraction (e.g. a closure or trait-callback that receives each clause slice + match-type) would remove the duplication and make it impossible for the two passes to diverge in how they identify clause boundaries.
